examples: Diaminopimelic acid pathway is one of the lysine biosynthetic pathways.
Corynebacterium glutamicum high-serine is used as a lysine-deficient strain of the bacteria fermentation in the industry.
Look at the absolute figures for lysine and arginine content.
If grain traders rig the price of lysine they can go to jail.
Crassicorophium goo, by contrast, is dominated by lysine, glycine and aspartic acid.
